fixes_applied: Stage 5 ablation: changed from percentage fracs (25/50/75/100) to explicit L={4,8,16,32} matching config and README
Stage 4 eval: added multi-seed loop (num_seeds=3) from config evaluation.num_seeds
eval_template_reasoning.py: cot_budget now reads temperature/top_p/max_new_tokens/vote from config evaluation.cot_budget
eval_template_reasoning.py: added eval_retrieval_compose() implementing the retrieval_compose method from config
eval_template_reasoning.py: n_samples for cot_budget now uses config evaluation.rerank_n (3) instead of hardcoded 5
eval_template_reasoning.py: added --skip_retrieval flag for ablation runs
extract_templates.py: _synthetic_fallback now emits explicit WARNING log and marks items with is_synthetic=True
extract_templates.py: saves extraction_meta.json with synthetic_used flag for downstream audit
mcd_split.py: min_unseen_compounds now enforced as hard constraint in first pass; relaxed fallback with doubled atom_tvd if needed
setup.sh: Python detection now checks CONDA_PREFIX and conda info --base for conda-only servers; validates version >= 3.10
run_all_experiments.sh: Stage 5 ablation passes --split_path to eval for MCD-split-aware evaluation
run_all_experiments.sh: random control ablation uses L=16 (main_size) instead of 50% fraction
remaining_items: No automated tests yet (integration tests would bring score to 9+)
Multi-GPU for extraction/eval still single-process (torchrun only for training)
